_comment: User-specific mappings and notes for the PDF rename program.

elmu._comment: Last 4 chars of ELMU measurement point ID mapped to company name (digits-only last4 tried first, then raw last4 chars as fallback)

e2._comment: Last 4 chars of E2 electricity measurement point ID mapped to company name (digits-only last4 tried first, then raw last4 chars as fallback)

fovarosi_vizmuvek._comment: Location keyword in usage address mapped to company name

heves_megyei._comment: Location keyword in usage address mapped to company name

dmrv._comment: Optional extra notes appended to DMRV filenames, keyed by invoice number

eon_del._comment: City associated with E.ON Dél-Dunántúli service location (default: Pécs)
